---
title: "About Me"
toc: false
---

Hi, I’m **Cheok En Qi**, a postgraduate student with interests in\
**data analytics and visualisation**.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## This Website

This site serves as a collection of my:

-   Hands-on exercises\
-   In-class practices\
-   Coursework submissions\

All pages are built using **Quarto + R Markdown**.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Links

-   GitHub: <https://github.com/cheokenqi97>
